pageMetaDesc: Insert applicants manually or from Excel using a brand-themed dashboard.
heading: Insert applicants with a focused admin workflow.
description: Select a company, add applicants manually or bulk import from Excel, validate everything up front, and submit clean payloads to the API.
noCompanySelectedHeading: Please select a company to proceed
noCompanySelectedDesc: Choose a company from the dropdown above to start inserting applicants.
typeTagPressEnter: Type a tag and press Enter
birthDateFuture: Birth date cannot be in the future.
profilePhotoFormat: Profile photo must be JPG or PNG.
profilePhotoSize: Profile photo must be 5 MB or less.
cvSize: CV must be 10 MB or less.
duplicateWarning: A matching applicant already exists in the current company scope for {name}. You can still submit again after confirming.
readyStatus: Ready to submit a pending applicant record.
ruleStatusBodyPrefix: Every applicant is submitted with status
ruleFileUploadsBody: Profile photos are uploaded as JPG or PNG and CV files are uploaded as PDF before submission.
ruleDuplicateBody: The form checks the current company scope for matching email or phone values before insert.
ruleJobDrivenBody: Selecting a job position loads its custom fields and job-spec responses dynamically.
genderMustBeMaleOrFemale: Gender must be Male or Female.
jobPositionNotFound: Job position "{jobTitle}" was not found. Available positions: {availablePositions}
duplicateEmailWarning: Duplicate email appears in row {rowNumber} (will still be submitted).
duplicatePhoneWarning: Duplicate phone appears in row {rowNumber} (will still be submitted).
existingApplicantWarning: Applicant may already exist: {applicantName} (will still be submitted).
noWorksheet: The uploaded file does not contain any worksheet.
failedToParseExcel: Failed to parse the Excel file.
uploadBeforeSubmit: Upload and parse an Excel file before submitting.
noValidRows: No valid rows are available for submission. Please fix the errors.
deleteSelectedRowsDesc: {count} row(s) will be removed. This cannot be undone.
bulkExcelDesc: Upload a spreadsheet, inspect the parsed rows, and submit only the valid applicants.
duplicateWarningDesc: Duplicate applicants will show a warning but can still be submitted.
orClickToBrowse: Or click to browse. Use the template matching your job position.
clickCellsToEdit: Click cells in the table below to edit data directly.
failedRedDesc: Missing required fields or invalid data - cannot submit
duplicateYellowDesc: Potential duplicate applicant - can still submit
applicantDataHint: Edit cells directly by clicking on them. Select rows to delete. Yellow rows have potential duplicates.
uploadToPreview: Upload an Excel file to preview applicant rows here.
